name: meta-agent-framework
description: Meta-Agent-Framework monorepo — 分布式 AI Agent 编排调度框架

scripts.install:local: bash scripts/sync-client-pkg.sh && cd packages/server && npm pack && npm install -g maf-meta-agent-server-*.tgz && rm -f maf-meta-agent-server-*.tgz && cd ../client && npm pack && npm install -g maf-meta-agent-client-*.tgz && rm -f maf-meta-agent-client-*.tgz
scripts.uninstall:local: maf-server stop 2>/dev/null; maf-client uninstall 2>/dev/null; npm uninstall -g @maf/meta-agent-server @maf/meta-agent-client 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.meta-agent-framework; echo '✅ 卸载完成'

author: fanlvchao <fanlvchao@gmail.com>
